ranked_candidates.match_explanation: Aisha matches all five required skills plus Redis from preferred skills and has 6 years of experience in the senior band. Her fintech background at Stripe is directly relevant to a payments platform.
ranked_candidates.conversation_summary: Aisha responded enthusiastically, confirmed she is actively looking, and showed genuine interest in the payments domain and remote setup.
ranked_candidates.why_this_candidate: Aisha is a rare complete match — all required skills, preferred skills, and the right seniority band. Her Stripe background means zero ramp-up time on payments logic.

messages.content: Hi Aisha! I came across your profile and think you'd be a great fit for a Senior Backend Engineer position at our company. The role focuses on Python, FastAPI, PostgreSQL. Would you be open to a quick chat?
Thanks for reaching out! This sounds like an exciting opportunity — I've been working on high-throughput payment APIs at my current role and this seems like a natural next step. Happy to chat.
Great! Can you share a bit about your experience with distributed systems and what scale you've worked at?

Sure — at Stripe I worked on the core payment routing service handling ~50k TPS. We used FastAPI, PostgreSQL with read replicas, and Redis for rate limiting. I also led the migration to async workers.
Impressive. What's your timeline and compensation expectations?
I could start in 3-4 weeks. I'm targeting $180-210k base, open to discussing equity. The remote-friendly setup is a big plus for me.

ranked_candidates.match_explanation: Tomasz matches all required and preferred skills with 6 years of senior experience. His async/Celery expertise is a bonus for a payments platform that needs background job processing.
ranked_candidates.conversation_summary: Tomasz was very responsive, asked detailed technical questions, and expressed clear interest in the compensation and remote flexibility.
ranked_candidates.why_this_candidate: Tomasz combines a full skill match with rare async processing depth (Celery) that payments platforms need. His high engagement in the conversation signals he will convert quickly.

messages.content: Hi Tomasz! I came across your profile and think you'd be a great fit for a Senior Backend Engineer position. The role focuses on Python, FastAPI, PostgreSQL. Would you be open to a quick chat?
Hi! Yes, I'd be interested. I've been building FastAPI services at Allegro for the past 3 years. What industry is the company in?
FinTech — payments infrastructure. We process millions of transactions daily. What's your experience with high-volume async systems?
Exactly my sweet spot. At Allegro I built the async order processing pipeline using Celery + Redis — we handled 2M+ events/day. Payments would be an exciting challenge.
Perfect. Are you open to relocation or is remote required?
I prefer remote but can travel quarterly. I'm looking for €85-100k range. When would the role start?

ranked_candidates.match_explanation: Ingrid matches 4 of 5 required skills plus Kubernetes from preferred. Minor gap on Docker but her K8s expertise implies container proficiency. 7 years puts her at senior-lead level.
ranked_candidates.conversation_summary: Ingrid responded quickly and professionally, showed clear interest and mentioned a preference for infrastructure-heavy backend roles which aligns well.
ranked_candidates.why_this_candidate: Ingrid brings platform engineering depth that most backend engineers lack — her Kubernetes and observability skills mean she can own reliability, not just features. Minor Docker gap is negligible given her K8s background.
